title: Vice Chancellor
content: Vice Chancellor: Dr. Rakesh Kumar Jain.

title: Registrar
content: Registrar: Dr. Sudhakar Shinde. Registrar email: registrar@adypu.edu.in.

title: Deans and Acronyms
content: SoD Dean (School of Design): Ar. Aparna Mhetras. SSD Dean (Student Service Division): Dr. Vijay Kulkarni. Law and Liberal Arts Dean: Dr. Sunny Thomas. SSD and SoD are different units.

title: Student Service Division
content: SSD full form: Student Service Division. SSD office reference: ULC 5. SSD email: ssd@adypu.edu.in.

title: Admissions
content: Admissions page: https://adypu.edu.in/admissions/. Admission flow: Fill application form, appear for entrance exam, merit list, counselling, admission confirmation, induction.

title: Fees and Mandatory Disclosures
content: Mandatory disclosures page: https://adypu.edu.in/admissions/mandatory-disclosures. Fees PDF (2025-26): https://adypu.edu.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/188.Fees-Structure_ADYPU_All-Programs_2025-26.pdf. Fees PDF (2024-25): https://adypu.edu.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/20.ADYPU_Fees-Structure_24_25.pdf.

title: Hostel
content: Hostel contact number: +91-8087778799. Hostel fee guidance range for project usage: ₹90,000 to ₹1,80,000 (excluding mess).

title: Placements and Corporate Relations
content: Placements and Corporate Relations leaders: Dr. Santosh P. Rao Borde and Dr. Tushar Ram Sangole.

title: International Collaborations
content: ADYPU international collaborations: 40 MoUs across more than 10 countries.
